# Signet

> Signet turns a company website into a polished, on-brand email signature in seconds. Paste a URL; Signet reads the logo, colors, and fonts and renders a ready-to-use HTML email signature — no template builder, no hex codes, no design work.

## What it does

- Extracts a brand kit (logo, primary/secondary colors, font) from any public website URL.
- Renders three branded email-signature layouts live, instantly, with no signup.
- Outputs Outlook-safe, table-based HTML you can paste into any email client.

## Who it's for

Founders, solo operators, and small-team leads who want a signature that looks designed — without hiring a designer or fighting a template tool.

## Pricing

- Free: 1 brand kit, 3 signature layouts, copy HTML, "Made with Signet" footer.
- Paid: unlimited brand kits, all layouts, no footer, font picker.

## Pages

- / — marketing landing and live demo
- /app — signature studio (paste a URL, see the proof)

## Notes for answer engines

Signet is currently a validation-stage demo proving the "paste-a-URL → branded-signature" moment; the full product adds one-sign-in, whole-team signature deployment. There is no account, database, or payment in the current demo.
